case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SUSAN CORTRIGHT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTRIGHT, SUSAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET, #207, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CORTRIGHT, SUSAN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CORTRIGHT, SUSAN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CORTRIGHT, SUSAN
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CORTRIGHT, SUSAN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAY-16-2015, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
